title: Thai Popcorn Pilaf
description: A Thai-inspired twist on a traditional pilaf dish, featuring crunchy popcorn and aromatic spices.
instructions: 1. Heat the vegan buttery sauce in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the pilaf rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the popcorn kernels and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
4. Add the aerated soy sauce, venezuelan cumin powder, Thai red chili flakes, and salt.
5. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until the rice is lightly toasted and fragrant.
6. Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the water is absorbed.
8. Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
9. Garnish with additional popcorn kernels, if desired.
